text_block_list.text: After a day out...
choice_data_list: This time I'll make sure you have fun!
This time I'll make sure you have fun!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Sigh.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Look, I didn't have any fun the last time you tried to play a game with me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Stop with the kiddy games. It's not gonna happen.

Sure—last time ended in failure—but today, I
have an ace up my sleeve. I know all about the
game she's been obsessed with recently.

RDLI is a PvP FPS developed overseas. What
makes it fun is the wide arsenal of weapons
players can use to outwit their opponents.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I thought I was the only one around here who
plays it...

I heard from Super Creek that Narita Taishin's
been grumbling about not having anyone to play
with.

I stand little chance of beating an experienced
player like her, but she'll probably enjoy it if I put
up a good enough fight.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Fine. I accept your challenge.

I'm a little unsettled by how readily she accepts
my offer, but I charge into battle nevertheless,
ready to give the fight of my life.
YOU LOSE.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: That's another win for me. I'm five for five now.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah? I mean, I do play a lot.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, you had a lot of nerve challenging me
despite being trash at the game.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You choose terrible weapons and stages, and you
suck at using the NPCs. Did you even change the
settings to match your play style?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
This is my first time playing PvP mode, so I was
looking forward to it, but playing against you is
disappointing as hell.

Narita Taishin is rarely this chatty. She seems to
be in a good mood now that she's found someone
to wipe the floor with.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
It's no fun like this... Want me to make things
easier for you?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Wow, no hesitation. Don't you have any pride?
choice_data_list: I just want to keep hanging out with you.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh?

If I keep losing so easily, she's going to get bored.
I'll gladly throw away my pride to give her a
better match.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Do you hear yourself? You are seriously have no
shame at all.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I'll only use the default weapons, and you can
borrow one of my SSRs. If you still can't win, then
you're a lost cause.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hmph, whatever.
YOU LOSE.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I knew you couldn't do it.

Even after countless rematches, I just can't win
against her. I try to apologize for being a terrible
partner, but she cuts me off.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: It's fine. We can play again some other time.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
The rewards they give out for winning PvP
matches are pretty good. Plus, crushing you is
kinda fun.

Her words are harsh, but at least she's giving me a
chance.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Hmm? You really think you can beat me without
any boosts?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Then you should just ask for a handicap. It'll even
the playing field.
choice_data_list:
This game is super fun, so I want to try winning
by myself.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I thought you were gonna complain about being
bad at strategizing, not getting the controls, or
that the game's too violent and scary.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: If you say so. Give me your best.
She seems to be in an even better mood, but...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
choice_data_list: Uh... What does this item do again?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugggh! Stop!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I'm getting ticked off just watching you play! You
should use that item you got earlier and...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
See? Now you get more health back. Restoration
items are vital to winning.
choice_data_list: I see now! You're incredible, Taishin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...This is, like, the most basic of basic knowledge.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Whatever. Agh, look at the time! I've wasted the
whole day with you!
choice_data_list: Thanks for teaching me so much, Taishin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I don't need your thanks! I'm leaving!

She leaves in a huff, but I'm glad I got to play so
many rounds against her.
